goal: Enhance main menu interaction: add a parallel story entry button, make top bar buttons open interactive panels, and wire a story screen route in the legacy App flow with consistent UI.
constraints: Do not change existing battleV2 core rules.
Keep existing main menu visual language and button arrangement style.
Do not remove existing start/characters/collection buttons.
Only modify files in allowed paths.
deliverables: Main menu includes a story-mode button parallel to existing primary entries.
Top bar buttons (profile/currency/events/quests/mail/settings) provide interactive panel content.
Legacy App flow can open StoryScreen and return to menu.
MvpFlow story back behavior remains correct.
